title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SOUTHWESTERN OREGON HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. 3333 Walnut Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Ages 6-18. Some programs enroll children younger than age 6. Hours: Varies by activities and programs Email (541) 267-3635 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 267-3635 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $15 annual membership fee. Other additional fees for sports programs. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-6:30pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
